category_sources: source_facts.description describes perceptual video quality assessment based on multi-method fusion.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Netflix VMAF repository, whose project name is VMAF.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official Netflix VMAF GitHub repository; its resource/doc directory contains official documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies perceptual video quality assessment; source_facts.executables includes the vmaf CLI.
